privileged_info_summary: The task is a synthetic drawing exercise in LibreCAD where users create a mechanical shaft cross-section drawing with a keyway notch. Verified specifications: shaft diameter 50mm (radius 25mm), required five layers (SHAFT, CENTER, HATCHING, DIMENSIONS, TEXT), output file shaft_keyway_section.dxf. However, the keyway dimensions (14mm width × 5.5mm depth) do not match any DIN 6885 standard specification for a 50mm shaft—actual DIN 6885-1 specifies 16mm × 10mm key with 4.3mm shaft keyway depth, while DIN 6885-3 (shallow pattern) specifies 14mm × 6mm key with 2.1mm shaft keyway depth. The 5.5mm depth is a non-standard custom specification between the two standards. Additionally, the task description requires text annotations including '1045' (carbon steel grade), but the metadata only lists three required text items.
